name: image_load_dll_system_management_automation_susp_load

("C:\\Windows\\System32\\dsac.exe", "C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\RemoteFXvGPUDisablement.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\runscripthelper.exe", "C:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\sdiagnhost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\winrshost.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\wsmprovhost.exe")) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\*",
